_comment: Per-policy human-readable metadata for Andamio mainnet credentials. Used by build-credential to populate OB 3.0 fields the chain does not carry. Add an entry per policyId as new samples are created.

3ed1bca6a9301a12a6787b22ffcac5a84867f8b2.title: Getting Started at Gimbalabs
3ed1bca6a9301a12a6787b22ffcac5a84867f8b2.description: An introduction to Gimbalabs as an organization, our learning model, and how to participate in our courses and projects.

ab5d9217bbbac409b3461a8bafe6daa4c0c6d4c5.title: Getting Started with Andamio
ab5d9217bbbac409b3461a8bafe6daa4c0c6d4c5.description: An introduction to Andamio: what it is, why it exists, and how it composes courses, projects, and credentials.

203e63f457e0b8088073ec20959c4e0cc188cf90.title: Join Cardano XP
203e63f457e0b8088073ec20959c4e0cc188cf90.description: The onboarding course for the Cardano XP contributor project. Prerequisite for joining the project itself.

e473f1d6827b4b5d11c52b9b5e0e44e16a3a0a59.title: Aiken Project-Based Learning
e473f1d6827b4b5d11c52b9b5e0e44e16a3a0a59.description: A project-based course on Aiken, Cardano's smart-contract language.

c478794581fb14b7c1ed90e2dfe05d8b27a0fbf2.title: Course Content Creator
c478794581fb14b7c1ed90e2dfe05d8b27a0fbf2.description: A course on how to author Andamio courses — SLT design, module structure, lesson types.

6d6038a79aaca16bbf6cc8db8b1ef7fcfe60b4df.title: Asteria Project Membership
6d6038a79aaca16bbf6cc8db8b1ef7fcfe60b4df.description: Vouching-pattern credential admitting a recipient to the Asteria project.

674da142911c910d0f79e1c92cc6089e797b344f.title: Sustain and Maintain Gimbalabs
674da142911c910d0f79e1c92cc6089e797b344f.description: An ongoing Andamio project where contributors sustain Gimbalabs infrastructure, content, and community programs. Joining requires prior completion of Getting Started at Gimbalabs.

b3e1a8e2d8f6cd07580875b6beee0241d693387e.title: Cardano XP
b3e1a8e2d8f6cd07580875b6beee0241d693387e.description: The Cardano XP contributor project — recipients earn XP for product feedback, contributions, and engagement on Cardano-adjacent work. Joining requires prior completion of the Join Cardano XP onboarding course.
